description: Compare flow_matching vs conditioned_denoising vs calibrated_reranker under identical sampling_steps=50 budget on unseen_pocket_pdbbindpp surface.

methods.name: flow_matching
methods.note: Optimized flow config from F2.1 sweep (beta_intra_red=0.05, gamma_probe=0.15)

methods.name: calibrated_reranker
methods.note: Reranker baseline with 50 candidates from 50 steps

execution_plan: 2. Run each method independently with sampling_steps=50
3. Collect candidate_valid_fraction and strict_pocket_fit_score from each
4. Compute delta metrics (flow vs baseline for both validity and pocket fit)
5. Document acceptance criteria: flow should improve pocket fit >=5% vs denoising, >=8% vs reranker
